message.content: {"title":"Terraform Governance Review","summary":"The Terraform changes are structurally sound, but governance requirements are not fully satisfied.","verdict":"warn","findings":[{"severity":"high","title":"Missing owner tag","details":"The resource metadata does not include the required owner tag.","recommendation":"Add an owner tag that maps to a responsible person or team."}],"next_steps":["Add the missing governance tags","Re-run the PR checks after updating the configuration"],"notes":["This is a dry-run fixture for local validation."]}
